name: freshbooks-timesheet
description: Check and log timesheets in FreshBooks from your AI agent.
long_description: Ask your agent to check which days you're missing time on, or to log hours across a week/month against a project — with PTO exclusion, a dry-run preview, and skipping of days already logged. First run: call the start_auth tool, approve in the browser, and paste the code into finish_auth. Credentials are stored by Claude Desktop in the OS keychain; rotating OAuth refresh tokens are handled automatically.

tools.name: start_auth
tools.description: Begin one-time FreshBooks authorization; returns a URL to approve.

tools.name: finish_auth
tools.description: Complete authorization with the code from the redirect URL.

tools.name: auth_debug
tools.description: Report non-secret fingerprints of the loaded credentials for troubleshooting.

tools.name: check_timesheet
tools.description: Report logged/missing/under-logged days for a day, week, or month.

tools.name: log_time
tools.description: Log hours per weekday against a project, with PTO exclusion and dry-run.

tools.name: list_time_entries
tools.description: List individual time entries with their ids for a day/week/month.

tools.name: update_time_entry
tools.description: Edit an entry — e.g. move it to a different project, or change note/hours.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List projects to choose which to log against.

redirect_uri.title: Redirect URI
redirect_uri.description: Must match the redirect URI registered in your FreshBooks app exactly (FreshBooks requires HTTPS).

tz.title: Timezone
tz.description: IANA timezone for day/week/month boundaries (e.g. America/Toronto).

max_log_days.title: Max days per log_time call
max_log_days.description: Safety cap on how many days a single log_time call may write.
